scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:html
scripts.format: prettier --write index.html assets/app.js assets/app.css config.js assets/config-local-loader.js lambda/index.mjs lambda/migrate-legacy-data.mjs scripts/generate-local-config.mjs eslint.config.js package.json .github/workflows/lint.yml
scripts.format:check: prettier --check index.html assets/app.js assets/app.css config.js assets/config-local-loader.js lambda/index.mjs lambda/migrate-legacy-data.mjs scripts/generate-local-config.mjs eslint.config.js package.json .github/workflows/lint.yml
